name: Legend of Legends: Orbs of Power

reviews.review_description: imagine your Neil and you got sucked into NES legend of Zelda.

What's up to the developers. This is a cool as game but it does have its glitches. Sometimes it throws me out the game and sometimes my weapons disappear and then I had to start all over just so I can get my weapons again. Please fix the problem and then you will get the five stars that you deserve. Thanks

As others have said, this is Zelda'esk....and in such as good way.   As someone who loved the original zelda and link on nintendo, this really does bring back some good memories.  I also agree with a couple suggestions:  Hitting is more difficult because of the delayed reset, so you end up hitting a blob 3 or 4 times instead of 2.  Also, if we could at least get a couple lives before going back to the house, that would be great...I look at the hearts as health since one hit can sometimes deplete multiple hearts.  Other than that, this is really well done and much appreciated!

developer_response.body: I'm glad you like the game grossegurke, and happy the inspiration has shown through.   The next update will address the way the damage and flash work, so I hope you like it when it releases. There may further be some tweaks to the enemy damage in order to dial in the perfect balance. Thank you for the feedback and I would love to hear more if you want to share on the discord. discord.gg/kaCMNS5ZQK

reviews.review_title: Huge issues need to be dealt with.
reviews.review_description: I really actually like this game, it feels like an old school classic. However; when I am cutting grass down by trees, it’ll drop health, and money, that it will not allow you to get at all. So maybe update it, getting rid of the grass in those areas, and replace them with indestructible bushes instead. It is very annoying walking back into an area, only to see so many things still floating there, waiting to be grabbed. Other than this issue which I find a big one, not well thought out. I do enjoy the classic feel of this title.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback Archmowie. The game has been updated so that loot no longer spawns in the tree line barrier. I really like your idea of using bushes in the areas you can't pass through,  and looking at adding that once I have something with the right look.

reviews.review_title: Great start to an awesome adventure!
reviews.review_description:
I am a 50 year old life time gamer that has been waiting for a zelda experience in vr, and this brings that to life.  
It needs some work, but the core is there.  I hope this gets the attention it deserves so the developers will continue progressing the game and make this what it it has the potential to be!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for giving this game a chance and your support.

reviews.review_title: THIS is why I love VR
reviews.review_description:
I’ve had this game in my wishlist for about 6 months now…. Couldn’t wait for this to drop. I was worried about the graphics and art design from the trailer, but once you’re in-game it’s very vibrant.  I’m a diehard Zelda fan going on 30yrs now, and I’ve been hoping someone would develop something similar… welp, it’s similar alright lol… all that’s missing is the Nintendo logo lol. And it’s brilliant! Zero load times when walking into new areas is a nice touch too. 

With that said, there are some serious QOL improvements badly needed:

- Dying seriously sucks. I almost made it through the first “tutorial” dungeon but died… figured I’d start at the beginning of the temple and make my way back to where I died. Nope… I’m teleported alllllllll the way back to my house. 

- Is there a map? How do I know which direction I’m going? A sign will tell me south is safer but I have no compass to know if I’m going south lol. Also need a map to know which areas ￼to visit, and how to navigate my way through them. 

- Please add a ruppee counter on my wrist. Took me a while to realize I needed to take my backpack out to view my count. 

- hit detection is off if you swing too fast.  An enemy might take 3 hits to die, but if you swing too fast it could take as many as 6-7. It deals damage every other sword slice. 

- Easier way to speed up dialogue without making it disappear too quick. I can press a button to speed it up but then the speech bubble disappears or moves on to the next line. 

- I was an issue drawing my sword sometimes. It was just glitch and I’d have to grab with my offhand to stop it from glitching. 


Other than these QOL improvements, this game is TOP NOTCH.  Really hope the dev continues updating… this could end up being a masterpiece once completed. 

And oh yeah, add a save button. I realllllly don’t want to start at my house every time I load in

developer_response.body:
Thanks for all the great feedback PowPow. Several of these items are in the queue to be addressed so sit tight. There are some new features in the work that are hopefully going to make some of these less painful but still retain the spirit of empowering the player through exploration. I've got improvements coming to the hit detection and the sword holster in the next update.
The idea of adding the gold count to your wrist is a great idea and one I hadn't considered. This is going on the list for possible future improvements.
Got more suggestions, tips, or just interested in what's coming? Check out the discord as: discord.gg/kaCMNS5ZQK

reviews.review_description: Much better than I expected it to be.

10/10 so far!  Definitely scratches the OG Zelda itch. Pulling all that nostalgia  into 3d VR was done so well. 

I've progressed as far as I can until the November update and I'm itching for more.  

I was able to provide some feedback to the dev on discord and all of it was promptly addressed in the very next update. That really impressed me and makes me appreciate this VR experience  even more.  

 I'm honestly excited to play more!  I'm hopeful there will be much more to this story as the world and tools expand.

developer_response.body:
I really appreciate the feedback, both here and on Discord. Input from passionate players like you has genuinely helped shape Legends into something stronger with every update.
The conclusion to the Orbs of Power questline is just around the corner, but that’s not the end. There are more plans ahead, and I’m in it for the long haul. Thanks for being part of the journey, stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
Great game, 
Really nice zelda like, feels like stepping inside the first zelda.The dungeons, the overworld, it is like those 2D zelda but in VR.
And it is really well done overall.
The musics are nice.

I’ve completed what is to be completed for the moment and it was definetely worth th price.

If you want that old school zelda fix go for it, this is a good pick up for sure.

developer_response.body: I'm really glad you've enjoyed the game and I'm excited to bring more content real soon.
